title: Accessible Notification

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Notification

Create a notification system with the following features:
1. Users can toggle the notification system on and off.
2. Notifications are displayed in a visually distinct way, with a high contrast color scheme.
3. Users can close notifications by clicking a close button or pressing the ESC key.
4. Notifications have a clear, concise message and are properly announced to screen readers.

constraints: Notifications should have a high contrast color scheme
Notifications should have a clear, concise message
Notifications should be properly announced to screen readers

gradingCriteria.description: The notification system is easily accessible from the user interface
The notification system has a clear and concise message
The notification system can be closed using a close button or the ESC key
The notification system has a high contrast color scheme
The notification system is properly announced to screen readers
